svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Resonance Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-644" dy="-282" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="1060" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6B21A8;" value="Resonance — System & Engineering Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="1160" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw_clients" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;" value="Clients (web, desktop-first responsive)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1160" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_creator" parent="sw_clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Creator
(onboard, publish, fulfill)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="120" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_member" parent="sw_clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Member
(discover, follow, buy)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="420" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw_web" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f3e8ff;strokeColor=#A855F7;fontColor=#6B21A8;fontStyle=1;" value="apps/web — Next.js App Router on Vercel (thin shell: composes & renders packages)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="1160" x="40" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w_pages" parent="sw_web" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A855F7;" value="RSC Pages & Layouts
(server render, streaming)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="250" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w_actions" parent="sw_web" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A855F7;" value="Server Actions
(mutations, Zod-validated)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="250" x="320" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w_routes" parent="sw_web" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A855F7;" value="Route Handlers
(auth, webhooks, AI stream)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="250" x="600" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w_weave" parent="sw_web" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#faf5ff;strokeColor=#A855F7;" value="Weave UI rail + feed
(client; TanStack Query)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="880" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw_pkgs" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#1F3A5F;fontStyle=1;" value="packages/* — framework-agnostic domain & platform logic (the monorepo core; pnpm-enforced boundaries)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1160" x="40" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_core" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="@resonance/core
types · Zod · ports" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="20" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_ui" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="@resonance/ui
shadcn + Figma tokens" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="185" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_db" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="@resonance/db
Drizzle · migrations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="350" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_ai" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="@resonance/ai
agent+tool registry
embeddings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="515" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_auth" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="@resonance/auth
Better Auth
magic-link" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="680" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_commerce" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="@resonance/commerce
Stripe Connect
(modeled · stubbed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="845" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_community" parent="sw_pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="@resonance/community
posts · feed
(stubbed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="140" x="1000" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_note" parent="sw_pkgs" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1F3A5F;fontStyle=2;" value="All packages depend on @resonance/core. Domain packages read/write through @resonance/db. No package imports another package's internals (ADR-0003)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1120" x="20" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw_ext" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;" value="External services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="1160" x="40" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_neon" parent="sw_ext" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#333333;" value="Neon Postgres
+ pgvector" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="170" x="40" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_gateway" parent="sw_ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Vercel AI Gateway
→ Claude (chat/gen)
→ Voyage (embeddings)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="200" x="260" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_stripe" parent="sw_ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="Stripe Connect
(marketplace payouts)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="190" x="510" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_resend" parent="sw_ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="Resend
(email — deferred)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="170" x="750" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_blob" parent="sw_ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontColor=#666666;" value="Vercel Blob
(media — deferred)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="170" x="970" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw_agentic" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#2D5016;fontStyle=1;" value="Agentic Engineering Layer — how agents (and humans) work in this repo (ADR-0014)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1160" x="40" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_claude" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="CLAUDE.md
root + per-package
(scoped context)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="175" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_adr" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="docs/adr/*
decisions & rationale
(ADR 0001–0015)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="175" x="210" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_skills" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value=".claude/skills/*
recipes (how we do X)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="175" x="400" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_hooks" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value=".claude/settings.json
hooks + CI gate
(format/lint/typecheck/test)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="175" x="590" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_mcp" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value=".mcp.json
Figma · Context7
Neon · Playwright" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="175" x="780" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_diagram" parent="sw_agentic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="docs/architecture/
THIS diagram
(living source of truth)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="170" x="970" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_creator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="sw_web" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_member" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="e_neon" value="SQL + pgvector"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed5" edge="1" parent="1" source="p_ai" target="e_gateway" value="provider/model"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ed6" edge="1" parent="1" source="p_commerce" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#999999;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=none;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#2D5016;fontStyle=2;" target="sw_ext" value="documents & guides every layer above"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
